mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing units sold (HOUST) above the 6-month moving average signals a strengthening demand for housing, which is positively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with rising HOUST are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or HOUST fails to rise above the 6-month moving average in > 60% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below the 6-month moving average signals a weakening supply chain, which is negatively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with declining INDPRO are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or INDPRO fails to decline below the 6-month moving average in > 60% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in initial unemployment claims (UNRATE) above the 6-month moving average signals a weakening labor market, which is negatively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with rising UNRATE are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or UNRATE fails to rise above the 6-month moving average in > 60% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the federal funds rate above the 6-month moving average signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods with rising FEDFUNDS are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or FEDFUNDS fails to rise above the 6-month moving average in > 60% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP (GDPC1) above the 6-month moving average signals a strengthening demand for goods and services, which is positively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with rising GDPC1 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or GDPC1 fails to rise above the 6-month moving average in > 60% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) and a 3-month increase in initial unemployment claims (UNRATE) signals a weakening supply chain and labor market, which is negatively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with declining INDPRO and rising UNRATE are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the joint signal fails to occur in > 60% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP (GDPC1) and a 3-month increase in housing units sold (HOUST) signals a strengthening demand for goods and services and housing, which is positively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with rising GDPC1 and HOUST are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the joint signal fails to occur in > 60% of instances.
